title: Orange Town Under Buggy’s Shadow
description: On pages 22–23, the Orange Town conflict focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, with Buggy’s occupation testing Luffy, Zoro, Nami, and the townspeople.
scene: This part follows the pressure inside Orange Town as Buggy’s crew, the Straw Hats, and the people caught between them react to the escalating fight.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Instructions: 3. Over! To start out, color, Lady (Have fun!) Use fresh color. People who don't like messing up make a photocopy to color and cut out instead. Cut it out

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: D. I'm Then glue Part II to the other end of the springy bit.

summary: The scene keeps the Orange Town arc moving by tying the immediate battle to the town’s fear, Nami’s motives, and Luffy’s instinct to answer cruelty directly.
